# prayertime-cli

> Stateless CLI for Islamic prayer schedules and countdowns, designed for agents, shell scripts, and direct terminal use. MVP 1 supports location search, daily schedule lookup, and countdown queries with strict JSON support, quiet scalar output, and documented exit codes.

This index points to the highest-value hand-written docs for agent onboarding. Prefer the task guide first, then the contract reference for stable output and error semantics.

## Core Documentation

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SeeknnDestroy/prayertime-cli/main/README.md): Fast entry point covering installation, common tasks, output modes, aliases, and exit codes.
- [docs/agent-workflows.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SeeknnDestroy/prayertime-cli/main/docs/agent-workflows.md): Natural-language intents mapped to stable commands for location search, schedule lookup, next-prayer countdowns, specific-prayer countdowns, and recovery.
- [docs/cli-contract.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SeeknnDestroy/prayertime-cli/main/docs/cli-contract.md): Stable CLI contract for required inputs, JSON success shapes, quiet mode, aliases, error payloads, and exit codes.
- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SeeknnDestroy/prayertime-cli/main/AGENTS.md): Compact repository briefing for coding agents, including source-of-truth rules and exact build, test, and docs commands.

## Architecture

- [docs/adr/0001-go-stack.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SeeknnDestroy/prayertime-cli/main/docs/adr/0001-go-stack.md): Rationale for the Go and Cobra stack.
- [docs/adr/0002-data-sources.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SeeknnDestroy/prayertime-cli/main/docs/adr/0002-data-sources.md): Source-of-truth decision for Open-Meteo geocoding and AlAdhan method 13.

## Optional

- [README.tr.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SeeknnDestroy/prayertime-cli/main/README.tr.md): Turkish overview for the main user-facing workflows.
